projects.name: AI-kubeHealer
projects.description: AI-powered Kubernetes debugging and auto-remediation platform, orchestrated by Temporal. Detects broken pods (CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled, ImagePullBackOff), diagnoses root cause using Claude, and auto-remediates via crash-proof Temporal workflows.

projects.name: user-metadata-service
projects.description: Production-grade Spring Boot microservice demonstrating SRE reliability patterns: idempotency via X-Idempotency-Key, retry with exponential backoff and jitter, circuit breaker, custom metrics, and structured logging.

projects.name: aws-ebs-autoscaler
projects.description: Terraform-based AWS EBS disk autoscaler with modular IaC for EC2, IAM, and DynamoDB. Isolated dev/prod environments, S3 remote state, and threshold-based autoscaling of EBS volumes.

projects.name: wanderlust-azure
projects.description: Three-tier MERN travel blog deployed end-to-end on AKS, built on a well-known open-source mega-project as the starting point and extended with a full DevSecOps/GitOps pipeline: Docker, Jenkins CI, GitOps CD.

projects.name: Taska-ToDo-List-App
projects.description: Full-stack Todo application (Node.js, Express, MongoDB, EJS views), Dockerized, extended from a DevOps learning starter with persistent storage, due dates, priorities, tags, and repeat intervals.

projects.name: Jenkins_SharedLib
projects.description: Jenkins Shared Library providing reusable CI/CD pipeline steps for use across multiple projects.
